languages.text: Повинуясь команде {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольного Торговца{/g}, сопровождающие отряд {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Адептус Механикус{/g} подняли в воздух рой сервочерепов. Направляемые бинарными гимнами, их {g|Encyclopedia:Auspex}ауспексы{/g} безошибочно обнаружили места, через которые мы могли проникнуть внутрь.

traits.locale_text: Повинуясь команде {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольного Торговца{/g}, сопровождающие отряд {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Адептус Механикус{/g} подняли в воздух рой сервочерепов. Направляемые бинарными гимнами, их {g|Encyclopedia:Auspex}ауспексы{/g} безошибочно обнаружили места, через которые мы могли проникнуть внутрь.

languages.text: At the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}'s command, the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} servants accompanying the squad released a swarm of servo-skulls into the air. Guided by binharic hymns, their {g|Encyclopedia:Auspex}auspexes{/g} unerringly detected usable points of entry.
languages.original_text: Повинуясь команде {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольного Торговца{/g}, сопровождающие отряд {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Адептус Механикус{/g} подняли в воздух рой сервочерепов. Направляемые бинарными гимнами, их {g|Encyclopedia:Auspex}ауспексы{/g} безошибочно обнаружили места, через которые мы могли проникнуть внутрь.

Guided by binharic hymns, their {g|Encyclopedia:Auspex}auspexes{/g} unerringly detected usable points of entry.

At the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}'s command, the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} servants accompanying the squad released a swarm of servo-skulls into the air. Guided by binharic hymns, their {g|Encyclopedia:Auspex}auspexes{/g} unerringly detected usable points of entry.

Obeying the Rogue Trader's command, the Adeptus Mechanicus servants accompanying the squad released a swarm of servo-skulls into the air. Guided by binharic hymns, their auspexes unerringly detected usable points of entry.

At the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}'s command, the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} servants who accompanied the squad released a swarm of servo-skulls into the air. Guided by binharic hymns, their {g|Encyclopedia:Auspex}auspexes{/g} unerringly detected usable points of entry.

At the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}'s command, the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} servants accompanying the squad released a swarm of servo-skulls into the air. Guided by binharic hymns, their {g|Encyclopedia:Auspex}auspexes{/g} unerringly detected usable points of entry.

languages.text: {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}行商浪人{/g}一声令下，随行的{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}机械修会{/g}修士向空中释放了一群伺服头骨。在二进制赞美诗的引导下，它们的{g|Encyclopedia:Auspex}鸟卜仪{/g}精准定位了可用的入口节点。
languages.original_text: At the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}'s command, the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} servants accompanying the squad released a swarm of servo-skulls into the air. Guided by binharic hymns, their {g|Encyclopedia:Auspex}auspexes{/g} unerringly detected usable points of entry.

traits.locale_text: {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}行商浪人{/g}一声令下，随行的{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}机械修会{/g}修士向空中释放了一群伺服头骨。在二进制赞美诗的引导下，它们的{g|Encyclopedia:Auspex}鸟卜仪{/g}精准定位了可用的入口节点。

languages.text: Los sirvientes del {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} que acompañaban al escuadrón siguieron las órdenes de{mf|l| la} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Comerciante Independiente{/g} y liberaron un enjambre de servocráneos. Los {g|Encyclopedia:Auspex}auspexes{/g}, guiados por himnos binarios, detectaron los posibles puntos de entrada.
languages.original_text: At the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}'s command, the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} servants accompanying the squad released a swarm of servo-skulls into the air. Guided by binharic hymns, their {g|Encyclopedia:Auspex}auspexes{/g} unerringly detected usable points of entry.

traits.locale_text: Los sirvientes del {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} que acompañaban al escuadrón siguieron las órdenes de{mf|l| la} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Comerciante Independiente{/g} y liberaron un enjambre de servocráneos. Los {g|Encyclopedia:Auspex}auspexes{/g}, guiados por himnos binarios, detectaron los posibles puntos de entrada.

languages.text: Obéissant à l'ordre {mf|du|de la} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}{mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}{/g}, les serviteurs de l'{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} accompagnant l'escouade lâchèrent une nuée de servocrânes. Guidés par des hymnes binhaires, leurs {g|Encyclopedia:Auspex}auspex{/g} n'eurent aucun mal à détecter des points d'accès exploitables.
languages.original_text: At the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}'s command, the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} servants accompanying the squad released a swarm of servo-skulls into the air. Guided by binharic hymns, their {g|Encyclopedia:Auspex}auspexes{/g} unerringly detected usable points of entry.

traits.locale_text: Obéissant à l'ordre {mf|du|de la} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}{mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}{/g}, les serviteurs de l'{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} accompagnant l'escouade lâchèrent une nuée de servocrânes. Guidés par des hymnes binhaires, leurs {g|Encyclopedia:Auspex}auspex{/g} n'eurent aucun mal à détecter des points d'accès exploitables.

languages.text: {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Hür Tacir{/g}'in emriyle {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} hizmetkârları, mangaya eşlik ederek havaya bir hizmelet sürüsü saldı. İkilidil ilahilerle yönlendirilen {g|Encyclopedia:Auspex}uzgörenler{/g}, kullanılabilir giriş noktalarını şaşmaz bir şekilde tespit etti.
languages.original_text: At the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}'s command, the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} servants accompanying the squad released a swarm of servo-skulls into the air. Guided by binharic hymns, their {g|Encyclopedia:Auspex}auspexes{/g} unerringly detected usable points of entry.

traits.locale_text: {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Hür Tacir{/g}'in emriyle {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} hizmetkârları, mangaya eşlik ederek havaya bir hizmelet sürüsü saldı. İkilidil ilahilerle yönlendirilen {g|Encyclopedia:Auspex}uzgörenler{/g}, kullanılabilir giriş noktalarını şaşmaz bir şekilde tespit etti.

languages.text: Auf Befehl {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}{mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin}{/g} entsandten die Diener des {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}, die den Trupp begleiteten, einen Schwarm von Servoschädeln. Geleitet von binhärischen Hymnen, entdeckten ihre {g|Encyclopedia:Auspex}Auspizien{/g} nutzbare Zugangspunkte.
languages.original_text: At the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}'s command, the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} servants accompanying the squad released a swarm of servo-skulls into the air. Guided by binharic hymns, their {g|Encyclopedia:Auspex}auspexes{/g} unerringly detected usable points of entry.

traits.locale_text: Auf Befehl {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}{mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin}{/g} entsandten die Diener des {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}, die den Trupp begleiteten, einen Schwarm von Servoschädeln. Geleitet von binhärischen Hymnen, entdeckten ihre {g|Encyclopedia:Auspex}Auspizien{/g} nutzbare Zugangspunkte.

languages.text: ローグトレーダーの命令に従い、その部隊に同行する機械神殿の聖職者は、サーボ・スカルの群れを空に放った。二項式による聖歌によって導かれ、彼らの感知器官は、侵入可能な場所を確実に探知した。
languages.original_text: Obeying the Rogue Trader's command, the Adeptus Mechanicus servants accompanying the squad released a swarm of servo-skulls into the air. Guided by binharic hymns, their auspexes unerringly detected usable points of entry.

traits.locale_text: Rogue Traderの命令に従い、その部隊に同行する機械神殿の聖職者は、サーボ・スカルの群れを空に放った。二項式による聖歌によって導かれ、彼らの感知器官は、侵入可能な場所を確実に探知した。
